member.name: T:AbilityKit.Protocol.GatewayTimeSync.WireTimeSyncBinary
member.summary: Wire time sync protocol codec backed by MemoryPack.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Protocol.GatewayTimeSync.WireTimeSyncReq
member.remarks:
MemoryPack GenerateType: unmanaged
long ClientSendTicks

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Protocol.GatewayTimeSync.WireTimeSyncRes
member.remarks:
MemoryPack GenerateType: unmanaged
long ClientSendTicks
long ServerNowTicks
long ServerTickFrequency

member.name: T:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.IsExternalInit
member.summary: Polyfill for C# 9.0 init accessor in .NET Framework 4.x. Required for MemoryPack generated code compatibility.
